summary: Frontend-only regression for Mr. Maybe Flight (Expo SDK 54 web preview, mobile viewport 375x667). All 10 user-facing flows pass. Critical user bugs from prior iterations are fixed: NO 'AsyncStorage Native module is null' anywhere in console, paper plane is rendered at ~62% screen height with white halo (NOT clipped at top), and Calibrate triggers HOLD STEADY 3-2-1 silent countdown. The only remaining defect is that the requirement 'No deprecation warnings about shadow*/textShadow* in console' is NOT met — those style props are still present in app/index.tsx and emit RN-Web deprecation warnings on every load.

ui_bugs.issue: Console still emits 'textShadow* style props are deprecated. Use textShadow.' — caused by styles.titleAccent (textShadowColor/textShadowOffset/textShadowRadius) on the 'Flight' title. Main agent's iteration-3 note claims these were removed but they were not removed from index.tsx.

Console still emits 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow.' — caused by styles.primaryBtn (shadowColor/shadowOffset/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius) on the START GAME button. Replace with boxShadow string for web compat or wrap in Platform.select.
RN-Web warning 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Several <View pointerEvents="none"/> / 'box-none' usages. Not blocking but pollutes console.

verified_flows: Home (/) loads, no red-screen, BEST SCORE card + START GAME / Settings / Calibrate buttons render
/game loads with Ready overlay; calibrate-button + ready-start-button + ready-back present
Paper plane sprite rendered at top=375.5 / window 667 -> center y ≈ 413.5 px (≈62% of screen height) with visible white halo backdrop. NOT clipped at top.
Calibrate button → HOLD STEADY overlay shows, 3-2-1 countdown completes, overlay dismisses, no console error, calibration saved silently
FLY → playing state with score-display, tilt-indicator, speed-indicator, pause-button, touch-capture all visible
Mouse-down on touch-capture → boost-active badge appears (BOOST pill)
pause-button → resume-button + quit-button visible; Resume returns to playing
pause-button → quit-button → URL navigates from /game back to / (home re-renders)
Settings: sensitivity-slider draggable (set to 0.70x then 2.20x without crash); persists across home↔settings navigation
Reset High Score (reset-highscore) press: no console error, value remains 0
No 'AsyncStorage Native module is null' or any AsyncStorage error in console anywhere
All routes (/, /game, /settings) load with no red-screen errors
action_items: Remove textShadowColor/textShadowOffset/textShadowRadius from styles.titleAccent in /app/frontend/app/index.tsx (or convert to a plain text since it's already styled in yellow with bold weight)
Remove shadowColor/shadowOffset/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius/elevation from styles.primaryBtn in /app/frontend/app/index.tsx (these were missed during the iteration-3 cleanup)
(Optional / low priority) Migrate remaining `pointerEvents` JSX props to `style={{pointerEvents:'...'}}` to silence the third RN-Web deprecation warning
critical_code_review_comments: iteration-3 PR claim 'Removed shadow*/textShadow* style props from buttons/overlays' is incomplete — index.tsx still has them on titleAccent and primaryBtn.
src/storage.ts try/catch wrapping is correctly applied — calibration/sensitivity/highscore all swallow errors. Good.
game.tsx correctly switched to useWindowDimensions(); plane anchor SH * 0.62 confirmed visually.

success_rate.frontend: 91% (10/11 acceptance criteria fully met; only #11 'no shadow/textShadow deprecation warnings' fails)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Public preview URL: https://flying-game-demo-1.preview.emergentagent.com (frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL, backend untouched this iteration). expo-router on web mounts both the prior and current screen as siblings, so testID queries can find duplicates after navigation; prefer URL assertion (page.url) over is_visible checks when verifying navigation. expo-sensors logs harmless 'setUpdateInterval not supported on web' — expected and not a bug.
rca_of_issue: Deprecation warnings: titleAccent in index.tsx uses textShadowColor/Offset/Radius which RN 0.81+ web flags as deprecated; primaryBtn uses shadow*. Iteration-3 cleanup removed these from game.tsx but missed index.tsx. Fix: delete those 4-5 style keys (titleAccent: textShadow*; primaryBtn: shadowColor/Offset/Opacity/Radius/elevation) — visual impact on web is negligible since shadows weren't rendering reliably anyway.
